blast_radius: Updating OpenClaw or dependencies can change runtime behavior and must follow clone-test-replace rather than in-place upgrade.
capability_needed: Patch OpenClaw and add dependency/security scanning gates
details: OpenClaw status reports an available update from 2026.5.7 to npm 2026.5.22. The repo contains several package manifests and install scripts that fetch external dependencies. Root npm audit did not run because there is no root package; each subproject and installed global component needs its own dependency/CVE gate.
proposed_resolution: Schedule a patch review through clone-test-replace, run npm audit/pip-audit or equivalent per subproject, pin or checksum external installers where feasible, and add a recurring update-status/security-audit digest.
resolution_notes:
2026-05-27T19:44Z OpenClaw pump: added a recurring no-spend dependency/security scan gate. New script scripts/security/dependency-security-scan.sh discovers committed package-lock projects, runs npm audit --package-lock-only --audit-level=high, fails on high/critical findings or scan errors, and reports installed OpenClaw 2026.5.7 vs npm latest 2026.5.26 without upgrading production in place. Converted scripts/security/npm-audit-all.sh into a compatibility wrapper and wired the scan into scripts/validate-no-spend.sh. Verification passed: dependency scan found 0 high/critical findings across lib/a2a-secure, plugins/openclaw-secure-a2a, scripts/namecheap-playwright, and ui/cto-chat; bash scripts/validate-no-spend.sh passed. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-012-dependency-security-gate-2026-05-27T1944Z.md. OpenClaw runtime upgrade remains open pending clone-test-replace candidate promotion.

2026-05-27T20:40Z OpenClaw pump: advanced the OpenClaw patch-management side without mutating production. Added scripts/security/openclaw-upgrade-candidate.sh, an isolated npm-exec candidate smoke that resolves openclaw@latest, disables lifecycle scripts, keeps npm cache under .cache/openclaw-upgrade-candidate, verifies openclaw --version and openclaw help, and writes a JSON summary. Verification passed against OpenClaw 2026.5.26 while production remains 2026.5.7. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-012-openclaw-upgrade-candidate-2026-05-27T2040Z.md. Remaining work: clone-test-replace promotion before any production runtime upgrade.

2026-05-27T21:10Z OpenClaw pump: advanced the OpenClaw upgrade clone-test path without mutating production. Added scripts/security/openclaw-upgrade-promotion-check.py, a no-spend readiness gate that validates the isolated OpenClaw npm candidate summary, proves lifecycle scripts were disabled, and refuses candidates that mutated production/global npm state; wired it into scripts/validate-no-spend.sh and added regression tests. Verification passed: openclaw-upgrade-candidate.sh refreshed the 2026.5.26 candidate, promotion check reported ready_for_clone_test_replace with production still 2026.5.7, 4 promotion-check tests passed, and validate-no-spend passed end-to-end. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-012-openclaw-promotion-gate-2026-05-27T2110Z.md. Remaining work: run clone-test-replace and promote only after candidate host validation.

2026-05-27T22:10Z OpenClaw pump: advanced the clone-test-replace validation path without mutating production. Added scripts/security/openclaw-upgrade-clone-verify.py, a clone-side no-spend verifier that checks installed OpenClaw version, `openclaw help`, and the isolated candidate target summary while emitting sanitized JSON with explicit no-production-mutation/no-spend/no-secret flags. Verification passed: 8 targeted tests passed, and the live production dry run correctly returned status=blocked because production remains 2026.5.7 while the isolated candidate target is 2026.5.26. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-012-openclaw-clone-verify-gate-2026-05-27T2210Z.md. Remaining work: run the verifier on a clone-test-replace candidate and promote only after the full candidate gate suite passes.

2026-05-27T22:25Z OpenClaw pump: advanced the OpenClaw upgrade clone-test path without mutating production. Added scripts/security/openclaw-upgrade-clone-gate.sh, a clone-side read-only promotion gate that runs the clone version/help verifier, the full no-spend validation suite, and the required A2A2H drift check before any OpenClaw upgrade promotion. Added tests/test_openclaw_upgrade_clone_gate.py. Verification passed: 11 targeted tests passed; a live production dry run failed closed as expected because production remains OpenClaw 2026.5.7 while the isolated candidate target is 2026.5.26, while validate-no-spend passed inside the gate. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-012-openclaw-clone-gate-2026-05-27T2225Z.md and logs/security/BACKLOG-012-openclaw-clone-gate-2026-05-27T2225Z.json. Remaining work: run this gate on an approved clone-test-replace candidate and promote only after candidate host validation.
rollback_plan: Keep current production untouched until the candidate passes; rollback by retaining cto-v1 and restoring previous package versions/config.
search_trail: Ran openclaw status and openclaw security audit --deep on cto-v1; result: 0 critical, 1 warn, 1 info; gateway bound to 127.0.0.1 with token auth.
Ran ss -ltnup on cto-v1; found public SSH plus public HTTP/HTTPS and loopback-only OpenClaw/Hermes/A2A services.
Queried Hetzner API for servers, primary IPs, and firewalls; found no cloud firewalls and multiple public CTO servers/candidates.
Inspected /etc/caddy/Caddyfile without secrets; cto.husband.llc reverse-proxies to 127.0.0.1:8088 with security headers and access logging.
Scanned git history/current tree for secret-shaped patterns and key material; confirmed historical VAPID private key material and multiple documented credential-handling risks.
Checked file permissions for /opt/cto, ~/.openclaw, ~/.hermes, ~/.codex; sensitive home config dirs are mostly 0600/0700, while project files are group-writable by cto group.
Checked unattended-upgrades; service is enabled and active.
Attempted privileged sshd/fail2ban verification; elevated execution is unavailable in this PWA runtime, so privileged SSH posture remains unverified.
surfaced_from: PWA request 2026-05-25 05:19 UTC — CISSP-like CTO security audit and prioritization
